scripts.generate:all: node scripts/generate-courses.js && node scripts/generate-programs.js && node scripts/generate-compare.js && node scripts/generate-projects.js && node scripts/generate-resources.js && node scripts/generate-cities.js && node scripts/inject-bidirectional-projects-links.js && node scripts/fix-internal-linking.js && node scripts/update-schemas-from-config.js && node scripts/fix-config-placeholders.js && node scripts/apply-config-tags.js && node scripts/restructure-pages.js && node scripts/fix-fallback-script-paths.js && node scripts/fix-og-completeness.js && node scripts/clean-inline-css.js && node scripts/cleanup-deleted-pages.js
scripts.optimize:head: node scripts/fix-head-structure.js
scripts.optimize:cleanup: node scripts/cleanup-comments.js && node scripts/cleanup-duplicates.js && node scripts/remove-empty-lines.js
scripts.optimize:all: npm run optimize:critical-css && npm run optimize:head && npm run optimize:schemas && node scripts/inject-geo-signals.js && npm run optimize:images && npm run optimize:pt-banner && npm run optimize:cleanup && node scripts/post-process.js && node scripts/migrate-css-postbuild.js
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:seo && npm run verify:schema && npm run verify:accessibility && npm run verify:headings && npm run verify:tracking
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run optimize:all && npm run validate && npm run verify && npm run verify:all
